name: Cajun Beans Over Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine undrained beans, undrained tomatoes, and all ingredients except cheese in a medium saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. To serve, split a piece of cornbread in half.
5. Spoon beans over the cornbread and sprinkle with cheese.
